summary: Change sync's cursorParam default from `after` to `page`, and synthesize the next integer page number whenever a full page came back without a body cursor.
reason: Freshservice paginates exclusively by integer `?page=N` and exposes the next-page URL only in the HTTP Link response header. extractPageItems' body-cursor scan therefore never finds a cursor, and the sync loop stops after page 1. The generator's pagination-style detection picked `after` from the spec without checking that Freshservice declares no body cursor.
validated_outcome: `freshservice-pp-cli sync --resource tickets` paginates through all pages until items < per_page returns; previously stopped at 100 tickets even when the tenant had thousands.
